metadata.description: Skills for interacting with Algolia search and analytics through MCP

plugins.name: algolia-mcp
plugins.description: Comprehensive skill for searching, analyzing, and getting recommendations from Algolia indices via the Algolia MCP server. Includes commands for connecting to Algolia, searching indices, analyzing metrics, and managing recommendations.

plugins.name: algolia-cli
plugins.description: Use for any hands-on Algolia admin operation: importing/exporting records, backing up indices, managing API keys, editing synonyms, configuring rules, changing settings (facets, searchable attributes), deleting records, copying/migrating indices, or automating Algolia in CI/CD. Contains exact CLI syntax, ndjson format requirements, and flag combinations that are easy to get wrong from memory. Do NOT use for frontend SDK (InstantSearch, React) or Algolia dashboard UI questions — see algolia-mcp for read-only search and analytics.

plugins.name: algobot-cli
plugins.description: Use for anything AI/agent/conversational built on Algolia: algobot CLI, Agent Studio, RAG systems, conversational product discovery, genAI content generation from search results (carousels, descriptions, headers), chatbots or recommendation agents using Algolia as retrieval, config-as-code workflows, multi-environment deploy (dev/staging/prod), memory and personalization, MCP tool integrations, conversation history / GDPR retention, or adding a chat widget alongside InstantSearch. Do NOT use for raw index ops (records, synonyms, settings) — use algolia-cli. Do NOT use for pure frontend search UI (InstantSearch, autocomplete) with no AI/agent layer.

plugins.name: instantsearch
plugins.description: Build production-quality search experiences (autocomplete, search results pages, faceted search) using InstantSearch with React, Vue, or vanilla JS. Covers discovery, implementation, styling, and review with expert guidance on widget selection, styling approaches, mobile overlays, and common anti-patterns. Do NOT use for backend index operations — use algolia-cli. Do NOT use for analytics or recommendations — use algolia-mcp. Do NOT use for AI/agent/conversational search — use algobot-cli.
